content.shortDescription: A tree plantation initiative promoting environmental sustainability and ecological responsibility.
content.description:
The Department of International Business, Pondicherry University, is organizing a Tree Plantation initiative as part of GLOBIZZ’26 to promote environmental sustainability and ecological responsibility.
This initiative encourages students and participants to contribute towards a greener future by planting trees and supporting global environmental goals such as climate action and life on land. Participants are invited to join in making a positive impact on the environment and fostering a culture of sustainability.

rules.rule: Participants should follow the guidance of organizers during plantation
Maintain cleanliness and protect the surrounding environment
Cooperate with volunteers and staff for smooth coordination
